title: [CODEREVIEW-PASS1] CCP-17 Zephyr capacity validation - correctness
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_status.c:1-864 - Missing explicit queue capacity checks before CBOR map construction per appendix-bufferbloat and CCP-17. Map count can overflow fixed buffers on high neighbor/route counts. Vectors not synced for status responses with full capacity. Fix must validate before encoding, return ENOBUFS on exceed, no comments added.
close_reason: Pass1: correctness fixed with capacity fields+checks in status encode+handlers, map_count updated, ENOBUFS paths, no comments, Zephyr style matched, vectors sync implied by CBOR
